comment: e2e3: Tier-1 recipe arms vs the ce-w005 control (E1's winner, same 100k/16ep/base48/w005 protocol, shard 0 of train-1m). e2-dwce = boundary-weighted CE (GT-boundary band 1px-dilated, weighted 5:1) - label errors live on boundaries, plain CE underweights them. e3-ema = EMA 0.999 judged at val/checkpoint time + 1-epoch linear LR warmup - insurance arm against the 500k bf16 divergence; must cost nothing on val to be adopted. Judged on val_bf + relay bench vs ce-w005.
